cards.title: Nodes, Messages, and Failures
cards.governance_note: Map nodes, links, message semantics, trust boundaries, latency, acknowledgments, retries, and failure assumptions.

cards.title: Replication, Consistency, and Consensus
cards.governance_note: Review replica versions, consistency guarantees, quorum rules, leader election, failover, and split-brain controls.

cards.title: Observability, Provenance, and Governance
cards.governance_note: Audit traces, message IDs, logs, service ownership, security, provenance, incident reconstruction, and governance gates.
